Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

模拟经营、写实模拟器、沙盒、化
妆/换装、互动小说
常用素材套路：
互动选择 →剧情发展 →故意失败 →
悲惨结局
偷情/绿帽剧情 →问题解决 →选项
拉扯→故意失败
未来创意趋势：
小游戏副玩法同样成为模拟经营手
游中的引流方法，小众题材更容易
获得玩家关注。

message.content:
This section supports retrieval for questions regarding:
- **Topics & Entities:** Popular gameplay genres in simulation mobile games (simulation management, realistic simulators, sandbox, makeup/dress-up, interactive fiction); ad creative strategies for simulation and hybrid casual games; market segments like mini-game collection platforms.
- **Dates:** Full-year coverage and trend analysis from January 2025 to December 2025.
- **Procedures & Creative Patterns:** Standard ad narrative structures used in 2025, specifically: (1) interactive choice → plot development → intentional failure → tragic ending; (2) affair/cuckold plot → problem solving → option tug-of-war → intentional failure.
- **Claims & Future Trends:** Mini-game side modes serve as effective user-acquisition tools for simulation management games; niche themes attract higher player attention; top hybrid casual games dominate both downloads and revenue; mini-game collection platforms are rapidly overtaking competitors; fast trend-following iteration is critical for casual game breakout success.
- **Metrics & Figures:** Monthly trends for average active ad creative volume and the percentage of new creatives launched each month in 2025. Monthly new creative percentages: Jan 44.8%, Feb 44.1%, Mar 47.2%, Apr 48.8%, May 41.7%, Jun 47.9%, Jul 51.3%, Aug 48.5%, Sep 49.1%, Oct 46.5%, Nov 46.9%, Dec 49.7%.
- **Evidence Types:** Industry analytics sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative Module and Advertiser Analysis Module, featuring monthly performance metrics, trend charts, and observational market claims.

   - **Input Text:**

     - Source: 广大大 -广告创意模块 (GuangdaDa - Ad Creative Module)
     - Date Range: 2025/1~2025/12
     - 热门玩法 (Popular Gameplay): 模拟经营 (Simulation Management), 写实模拟器 (Realistic Simulator), 沙盒 (Sandbox), 化妆/换装 (Makeup/Dress-up), 互动小说 (Interactive Fiction)
     - 常用素材套路 (Common Ad Creative Tropes/Patterns):
       - 互动选择 →剧情发展 →故意失败 →悲惨结局 (Interactive choice → Plot development → Intentional failure → Tragic ending)
       - 偷情/绿帽剧情 →问题解决 →选项拉扯→故意失败 (Affair/Cuckold plot → Problem solving → Option tug-of-war → Intentional failure)
     - 未来创意趋势 (Future Creative Trends): 小游戏副玩法同样成为模拟经营手游中的引流方法，小众题材更容易获得玩家关注。(Mini-game side gameplay is also becoming a traffic-driving method for simulation management mobile games; niche themes are more likely to attract player attention.)
     - Note: 点击图片播放完整创意 (Click image to play full creative)
     - Page number: 60
     - Source: 广大大 -广告主分析模块 (GuangdaDa - Advertiser Analysis Module)
     - Date Range: 2025/1~2025/12

I'll interpret it as monthly metrics for ad creatives in 2025.)
     - Claim/Statement: 混合休闲手游头部实现下载收入双制霸，小游戏合集平台类产品弯道超车，快速跟风迭代成为休闲游戏出圈关键 (Top hybrid casual mobile games dominate both downloads and revenue; mini-game collection platform products overtake quickly; rapid trend-following iteration is key for casual games to break out.)

2.  **Identify Key Elements for Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**
   - **Topics:** Simulation mobile game ad creative strategies, popular gameplay genres, ad creative tropes/patterns, future creative trends, hybrid casual game market performance, mini-game platforms.
   - **Entities:** 广大大 (GuangdaDa - data source), 模拟经营手游 (Simulation management mobile games), 混合休闲手游 (Hybrid casual mobile games), 小游戏合集平台 (Mini-game collection platforms).
   - **Dates:** January 2025 to December 2025.

   - **Tables/Figures/Metrics:** Monthly trend of average active ad creative volume and percentage of new creatives for Jan-Dec 2025 (specific percentages provided per month).

   - **Market claims** about hybrid casual games (top titles dominate downloads/revenue, mini-game collection platforms are gaining ground, and rapid trend-following iteration is critical for breakout success).

response_text:
This section supports retrieval for questions regarding:
- **Topics & Entities:** Popular gameplay genres in simulation mobile games (simulation management, realistic simulators, sandbox, makeup/dress-up, interactive fiction); ad creative strategies for simulation and hybrid casual games; market segments like mini-game collection platforms.
- **Dates:** Full-year coverage and trend analysis from January 2025 to December 2025.
- **Procedures & Creative Patterns:** Standard ad narrative structures used in 2025, specifically: (1) interactive choice → plot development → intentional failure → tragic ending; (2) affair/cuckold plot → problem solving → option tug-of-war → intentional failure.
- **Claims & Future Trends:** Mini-game side modes serve as effective user-acquisition tools for simulation management games; niche themes attract higher player attention; top hybrid casual games dominate both downloads and revenue; mini-game collection platforms are rapidly overtaking competitors; fast trend-following iteration is critical for casual game breakout success.
- **Metrics & Figures:** Monthly trends for average active ad creative volume and the percentage of new creatives launched each month in 2025. Monthly new creative percentages: Jan 44.8%, Feb 44.1%, Mar 47.2%, Apr 48.8%, May 41.7%, Jun 47.9%, Jul 51.3%, Aug 48.5%, Sep 49.1%, Oct 46.5%, Nov 46.9%, Dec 49.7%.
- **Evidence Types:** Industry analytics sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative Module and Advertiser Analysis Module, featuring monthly performance metrics, trend charts, and observational market claims.
